title: chapmannia prismatica
side_effects: Chapmannia prismatica can have side effects if used improperly, such as liver damage, kidney failure, and allergic reactions. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts can also lead to nausea, dizziness, and headaches. In severe cases, improper use of Chapmannia prismatica has been linked to seizures, respiratory problems, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these serious side effects.
